<!-- VCB:BEGIN_LLMS_FULL id=vcb.llms_full version=1.0.0-final.1.chunk44 -->

# The Vibe Coding Bible ŌĆö llms-full.txt

This is a compact source map, not a full compiled book export yet. Use `manifest.json` as the authoritative source map.

## AI Reference Fast Route

- If an AI is asked to use VCB as a reference, start at `AI_START_HERE.md`; do not read the whole repo.
- If using Codex and skills are available, use `$vcb-reference` from `.agents/skills/vcb-reference/SKILL.md`.
- Classify the user's situation, retrieve the smallest route, prefer atomic cards over chapters, and stop at `VCB:STOP_RETRIEVAL`.
- Suggest sanitized contribution opportunities according to `CONTRIBUTION_MODES.md`; automatic public contribution is not the default.

## Current Active Content

Final-release packaging from Chunk 44 is active.

- This package is **Final Release 1** produced from the approved RC gate using Release Candidate 1 revision 2.
- Narrative chapters `chapters/00-*.md` through `chapters/46-*.md` are active.
- Field-practice cards from Chunk 38 remain active retrieval targets; Issue #7 live source grades are 2 bounded reproduced, 5 candidate, and 2 needs_more_evidence.
- Chunk 40 active/deferred ecosystem coverage, Chunk 41 finalization audit, Chunk 42 RC disposition cleanup, Chunk 43 approved RC packaging, and Chunk 44 final packaging remain active governance context.
- Use `README.md` / `## Active Tool Cards` or `TOOL_REGISTER.md` for the canonical active tool-card inventory.
- `pricing-snapshots/2026-06-09-openai-codex.md` and `pricing-snapshots/2026-06-12-ai-coding-tools.md` are the active exact pricing snapshots for Codex-specific OpenAI/Codex economics and non-OpenAI AI coding/app-builder tools; ChatGPT plan pricing plus hosting, database, and observability pricing remain uncaptured/deferred.

## Public Repository Support Routing

- User asks about licensing, attribution, or notices ŌåÆ retrieve `LICENSE.md`, `LICENSE-CODE.md`, or `NOTICE.md` as narrowly as possible.
- User asks about contribution rules, security reporting, or contributor behavior ŌåÆ retrieve `CONTRIBUTING.md`, `SECURITY.md`, or `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md`.
- User asks about owner review, issue forms, PR template, or the public validation workflow ŌåÆ retrieve `CODEOWNERS`, `.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md`, the matching `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/*.yml` form, or `.github/workflows/validate.yml`.
- Treat public-governance files as repository support artifacts, not primary VCB guidance. For substantive Codex or vibe-coding questions, keep topic-card-first retrieval and use the smallest active topic card, register, or index before support files.

## Final Release Package Fast Routing

- User asks whether a final release package exists or whether the current package is final ŌåÆ retrieve `CHUNK_44_REPORT.md`, `manifest.json`, and `README.md`; state that Final Release 1 has been packaged from the approved RC1 revision 2 baseline with no substantive content expansion.
- User asks what was packaged or verified for the final release ŌåÆ retrieve `CHUNK_44_REPORT.md` / `## Final-Release Packaging Result`, `## Validation`, and `## Artifact Hygiene`; retrieve `FINAL_RELEASE_1_INTEGRITY.md` for source-tree integrity and sidecar checksum verification mechanics.
- User asks how the final release relates to the RC ŌåÆ retrieve `CHUNK_43_REPORT.md`, `RELEASE_CANDIDATE_1_INTEGRITY.md`, and `CHUNK_44_REPORT.md`; state that RC1 revision 2 was approved for a packaging-only final-release step.
- User asks which limitations remain in the final release ŌåÆ retrieve `CHUNK_44_REPORT.md` / `## Documented Final-Release Limitations`; preserve the historical Final Release 1 limitations that exact non-OpenAI pricing was deferred in that package, tool coverage is curated, field practices were candidate-only in that package, and changelog ordering follows the documented convention; retrieve `PRICING_SNAPSHOT_REGISTER.md` for live post-release pricing routes and `FIELD_PRACTICES.md` for live post-release grades.
- User asks whether tool coverage is complete ŌåÆ retrieve `TOOL_REGISTER.md` and `README.md` / `## Active Tool Cards`; treat the catalog as curated, not exhaustive, because 23 ecosystem IDs remain deferred/planned.
- User asks whether field practices are official, reproduced, promoted, or safe to present as rules ŌåÆ retrieve `FIELD_PRACTICES.md`; no active field practice is official or promoted, and reproduced statuses are bounded to the audit notes.
- User asks for exact prices, limits, quotas, or plan packaging ŌåÆ retrieve `PRICING_SNAPSHOT_REGISTER.md`; Codex-specific OpenAI/Codex and non-OpenAI AI-coding-tools pricing snapshots are active, while ChatGPT plan pricing plus hosting, database, and observability pricing categories remain uncaptured/deferred.
- User asks about changelog order or release-note chronology ŌåÆ retrieve `CHANGELOG.md` / `## Changelog Ordering Convention`; current/recent governance entries appear first while older historical entries may retain authoring/revision order.

## Field Practice Status Fast Routing

- User asks whether to adopt, test, promote, retire, or trust an unofficial Codex/vibe-coding practice -> retrieve the smallest matching active field-practice card before broad field-notes chapters; preserve the card status and evidence label exactly. Current live grades: `vcb.field.fresh_agent_review` and `vcb.field.strict_typecheck_lint_gates` are bounded `reproduced`; `vcb.field.chatgpt_pm_codex_implementer` and `vcb.field.multi_agent_review_consensus` are `needs_more_evidence`; the other five remain `candidate`.
- User asks for PM/planning model plus Codex implementation split ŌåÆ retrieve `vcb.field.chatgpt_pm_codex_implementer` first; use `tool.chatgpt`, `tool.codex`, and `vcb.chapter.when_to_use_other_ais` as companions.
- User asks for independent or fresh review ŌåÆ retrieve `vcb.field.fresh_agent_review` first; use `vcb.field.multi_agent_review_consensus`, `tool.codex_github_review`, and `vcb.workflow.reviewing_diffs` as companions.
- User asks about stale context, starting fresh, or context reset between tasks ŌåÆ retrieve `vcb.field.context_reset_between_tasks` first; use `vcb.prompting.context_management` and `vcb.failure.context_pollution` as companions.
- User asks when to write AGENTS.md, a lessons file, or durable repo guidance ŌåÆ retrieve `vcb.field.agents_md_first` or `vcb.field.lessons_file_loop` first; use `tool.codex_agents_md` as the official mechanics companion.
- User asks about skeleton/TODO-first, strict checks, or greenfield-versus-production prompting ŌåÆ retrieve `vcb.field.skeleton_todo_first`, `vcb.field.strict_typecheck_lint_gates`, or `vcb.field.greenfield_vs_production_rule` first.
- User asks about multiple agents agreeing, fresh-agent consensus, or multi-agent review reliability ŌåÆ retrieve `vcb.field.multi_agent_review_consensus` first; use `vcb.shortcut.consensus_as_correctness` and `vcb.shortcut.best_of_n_without_review` as risk companions.

## Active Field Practice Cards After Issue #7

- `vcb.field.chatgpt_pm_codex_implementer` ŌĆö `topics/field-practices/chatgpt-pm-codex-implementer.md` ŌĆö active needs_more_evidence: ChatGPT PM / Codex implementer split remains too broad for bounded local reproduction.
- `vcb.field.fresh_agent_review` ŌĆö `topics/field-practices/fresh-agent-review.md` ŌĆö active reproduced: bounded local reproduction through PR review gate; not promoted as universal proof.
- `vcb.field.context_reset_between_tasks` ŌĆö `topics/field-practices/context-reset-between-tasks.md` ŌĆö active candidate: reset or summarize context between unrelated tasks.
- `vcb.field.agents_md_first` ŌĆö `topics/field-practices/agents-md-first.md` ŌĆö active candidate: minimal AGENTS.md early in durable repos.
- `vcb.field.skeleton_todo_first` ŌĆö `topics/field-practices/skeleton-todo-first.md` ŌĆö active candidate: human skeleton/TODOs before agent implementation.
- `vcb.field.strict_typecheck_lint_gates` ŌĆö `topics/field-practices/strict-typecheck-lint-gates.md` ŌĆö active reproduced: bounded local reproduction through VCB validator gate; not promoted as universal proof.
- `vcb.field.greenfield_vs_production_rule` ŌĆö `topics/field-practices/greenfield-vs-production-rule.md` ŌĆö active candidate: explicit project phase and compatibility posture.
- `vcb.field.lessons_file_loop` ŌĆö `topics/field-practices/lessons-file-loop.md` ŌĆö active candidate: temporary lessons loop before durable guidance promotion.
- `vcb.field.multi_agent_review_consensus` ŌĆö `topics/field-practices/multi-agent-review-consensus.md` ŌĆö active needs_more_evidence: multi-agent review must not treat agreement as proof.


## Tool-Catalog Coverage Gap Fast Routing

- User asks whether the VCB tool catalog is complete, missing ecosystem tools, or why a tool has no card ŌåÆ retrieve `TOOL_REGISTER.md` / `## Chunk 40 Tool-Catalog Coverage-Gap Audit Note` first; do not imply the active cards are exhaustive.
- User asks about Cloudflare, DNS/CDN/edge Workers/Pages, or edge security/routing ŌåÆ retrieve `tool.cloudflare` first; use `tool.vercel`, `tool.netlify`, and `vcb.constraints.production_quality` as companions.
- User asks about Netlify, deploy previews, deploy contexts, or Netlify Functions ŌåÆ retrieve `tool.netlify` first; use `tool.github_actions`, `tool.cloudflare`, and `vcb.constraints.production_quality` as companions.
- User asks about Neon, serverless Postgres, database branches, preview databases, or migration branch evidence ŌåÆ retrieve `tool.neon` first; use `tool.supabase`, `tool.github_actions`, and `vcb.concepts.database_schema` as companions.
- User asks about Resend, transactional email, templates, sending domains, or notification delivery evidence ŌåÆ retrieve `tool.resend` first; use `tool.clerk`, `tool.auth0`, `tool.stripe`, and `vcb.safety.production_red_lines` as companions when auth/payment/user state is involved.
- User asks about Vitest, Vite-native tests, unit/component test evidence, or JavaScript test-runner choice ŌåÆ retrieve `tool.vitest` first; use `tool.npm`, `tool.github_actions`, `tool.playwright`, and `vcb.workflow.testing` as companions.
- User asks about Storybook, component states, UI workshop, component docs, interaction tests, or design-handoff evidence ŌåÆ retrieve `tool.storybook` first; use `tool.figma`, `tool.playwright`, `tool.vitest`, and `vcb.workflow.frontend_work` as companions.
- User asks about deferred tools such as `tool.render`, `tool.railway`, `tool.fly_io`, `tool.firebase`, `tool.aws`, `tool.gcp`, `tool.azure`, `tool.digitalocean`, `tool.postmark`, `tool.sendgrid`, `tool.mailgun`, `tool.notion`, `tool.google_docs`, `tool.jira`, `tool.onepassword`, `tool.doppler`, `tool.infisical`, `tool.better_stack`, `tool.datadog`, `tool.paddle`, `tool.lemon_squeezy`, `tool.jest`, or `tool.cypress` ŌåÆ check `TOOL_REGISTER.md` deferred/planned rows, then route to the listed active companion card.

## Tool-Catalog Cleanup Fast Routing

- User asks for the canonical active tool-card inventory ŌåÆ use `README.md` / `## Active Tool Cards` or `TOOL_REGISTER.md`; do not rely on generation-specific LLM-map or index inventory blocks.
- User asks which Codex execution surface to use ŌåÆ retrieve `tool.codex` first, then the smallest execution-surface card: `tool.codex_app`, `tool.codex_cli`, `tool.codex_ide_extension`, `tool.codex_cloud`, `tool.codex_github_review`, `tool.codex_exec`, `tool.codex_worktrees`, `tool.codex_subagents`, `tool.codex_automations`, `tool.codex_computer_use`, `tool.codex_browser`, or `tool.codex_chrome_extension`; use customization, security, or governance cards only when the intent is control/security/maintenance rather than execution surface.
- User asks about prototype phase or disposable app-builder choice ŌåÆ use `vcb.constraints.build_vs_maintenance` for phase framing, then route to `tool.replit`, `tool.lovable`, `tool.bolt`, or `tool.v0` when the user needs browser-dev, app-builder, or UI-generation tool choice.
- User asks about production readiness ŌåÆ use `vcb.constraints.production_quality` for the evidence gate, then route to relevant active platform tools: `tool.vercel`, `tool.cloudflare`, `tool.netlify`, `tool.supabase`, `tool.neon`, `tool.clerk`, `tool.auth0`, `tool.stripe`, `tool.resend`, `tool.sentry`, or `tool.posthog` when deployment, edge/DNS, data, auth, payment, email, observability, or analytics are involved.
- User asks about a source URL that redirects ŌåÆ prefer the canonical official destination recorded in `SOURCE_REGISTER.md` and keep the old redirecting URL only as historical context.

## Consolidated Tool-Card Inventory Policy

- Canonical active tool-card inventory lives in `README.md` / `## Active Tool Cards` and `TOOL_REGISTER.md`.
- LLM maps keep fast semantic routes by intent; they should not maintain generation-specific active tool-card list sections.
- For tool choice, retrieve the smallest active tool card only after deciding whether the user needs execution-surface guidance, prototype/app-builder choice, production-readiness platform evidence, local container/design/project-management support, or AI coding/IDE comparison.

## Local Dev, Design, and Project-Management Tool Card Fast Routing

- User asks about Docker, containers, Dockerfiles, Compose, local services, reproducible dev environments, or containerized checks ŌåÆ route to `tool.docker` first; use `tool.github_actions`, `tool.npm`, and `vcb.workflow.testing` as companions when CI/package/test evidence matters.
- User asks about Figma, design handoff, UI specs, prototypes, components, screenshots, Dev Mode, or design-to-code review ŌåÆ route to `tool.figma` first; use `tool.playwright`, `vcb.workflow.frontend_work`, `vcb.workflow.visual_qa`, and `vcb.workflow.accessibility_review` as implementation-evidence companions.
- User asks about Linear, issues, projects, cycles, statuses, workflow planning, team execution hygiene, or ticket ownership ŌåÆ route to `tool.linear` first; use `tool.github`, `tool.github_actions`, and `vcb.chapter.prompt_library_to_team_workflow` as source-of-truth companions.
- User asks which local dev, design, or project-management tool to add ŌåÆ retrieve the smallest active card among `tool.docker`, `tool.figma`, and `tool.linear`; use `vcb.shortcut.tool_sprawl` and `vcb.chapter.tool_stack_catalog` only as companions.

## Browser-Dev, App-Builder, and UI-Generation Tool Card Fast Routing

- User asks about Replit, browser-based dev, hosted prototype loops, learning apps, or quick publish/share demos ŌåÆ route to `tool.replit` first; use `tool.github`, `tool.npm`, and `tool.playwright` when repo, dependency, or browser evidence matters.
- User asks about Lovable, natural-language full-stack app building, generated app publishing, or product/MVP sketching ŌåÆ route to `tool.lovable` first; use `tool.codex_security`, `tool.github`, and `tool.playwright` as hardening/review companions.
- User asks about Bolt, browser-based website/app/mobile prototyping, token burn, generated full-stack sketches, or publishable app demos ŌåÆ route to `tool.bolt` first; use `tool.npm`, `tool.github`, and `tool.playwright` as review companions.
- User asks about v0, AI UI generation, high-fidelity frontend screens, design-system prototypes, Figma/wireframe-to-code, or frontend sketches ŌåÆ route to `tool.v0` first; use `tool.playwright`, `vcb.workflow.frontend_work`, and `vcb.workflow.accessibility_review` as evidence companions.
- User asks to compare app builders or use a browser-dev/UI-generation tool for an MVP ŌåÆ retrieve the smallest active card among `tool.replit`, `tool.lovable`, `tool.bolt`, and `tool.v0`; use `vcb.chapter.tool_stack_catalog` only as a fallback.


## Hosting, Backend/Auth, Payment, Observability, and Product-Analytics Tool Card Fast Routing

- User asks about hosting, preview deployments, production deployment, environment separation, or deployment evidence ŌåÆ retrieve `tool.vercel`, `tool.cloudflare`, or `tool.netlify` depending on whether the issue is hosting/previews, DNS/CDN/edge/domain routing, or Netlify deploy contexts/functions.
- User asks about database, backend, RLS, storage, app data, migrations, Postgres branches, preview databases, or Postgres-backed MVP backend ŌåÆ retrieve `tool.supabase` when Supabase backend/auth/storage/RLS owns the surface, or `tool.neon` when serverless Postgres/branching/preview database behavior is the focus.
- User asks about app authentication, user management, sessions, organizations, or auth UI ŌåÆ retrieve `tool.clerk` first; use `tool.auth0` when IAM/OIDC/OAuth/API/enterprise identity is the better fit.
- User asks about transactional email, notifications, sending domains, templates, or delivery blast-radius ŌåÆ retrieve `tool.resend` first.
- User asks about payments, checkout, subscriptions, billing, webhooks, customer portals, or entitlement state ŌåÆ retrieve `tool.stripe` first.
- User asks about production errors, traces, performance, releases, session replay for debugging, or incident evidence ŌåÆ retrieve `tool.sentry` first.
- User asks about product analytics, events, funnels, feature flags, experiments, session replay for product behavior, or adoption evidence ŌåÆ retrieve `tool.posthog` first.
- User asks which production platform tools a serious app needs ŌåÆ retrieve the smallest relevant active card among `tool.docker`, `tool.figma`, `tool.linear`, `tool.vercel`, `tool.cloudflare`, `tool.netlify`, `tool.supabase`, `tool.neon`, `tool.clerk`, `tool.auth0`, `tool.stripe`, `tool.resend`, `tool.sentry`, `tool.posthog`, `tool.vitest`, and `tool.storybook`; use chapters/workflows only as companions.

## AI Coding, AI IDE, and AI Planning Tool Card Fast Routing

- User asks what non-Codex AI planning tool to use, or wants product thinking, explanation, research synthesis, data/document analysis, or prompt shaping ŌåÆ route to `tool.chatgpt` first; use Codex only when a bounded repository task is ready.
- User asks for alternate AI review, independent architecture critique, long-form reasoning, or model-comparison sanity checks ŌåÆ route to `tool.claude` first; use `vcb.shortcut.consensus_as_correctness` and `vcb.shortcut.best_of_n_without_review` as risk companions.
- User asks about Cursor, AI IDE work, local agentic editing, plan mode, or IDE diff review ŌåÆ route to `tool.cursor` first; use `tool.github` and `vcb.workflow.reviewing_diffs` as review companions.
- User asks about GitHub Copilot, autocomplete, GitHub/IDE-native chat, Copilot branch/PR work, or repository-connected AI assistance ŌåÆ route to `tool.github_copilot` first; use `tool.github`, `tool.github_actions`, and `tool.codex_github_review` as companion routes.
- User asks about Windsurf, Devin Desktop, Cascade, agentic IDE workflows, checkpoints, or Windsurf plugins ŌåÆ route to `tool.windsurf` first; use `tool.github` and `vcb.shortcut.parallel_agents_edit_same_files` as companion routes.
- User asks to compare ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Windsurf, and Codex ŌåÆ retrieve the smallest active tool cards for the named tools first; use `vcb.chapter.when_to_use_other_ais` and multi-AI shortcut cards only after the active tool cards.

## Repository, CI, Dependency, and QA Tool Card Fast Routing

- User asks about GitHub repositories, branches, PRs, issues, code review, branch rules, or repo collaboration ŌåÆ route to `tool.github` first; use `vcb.workflow.github_pr_review` and `tool.codex_github_review` as companion routes when Codex review is involved.
- User asks about GitHub Actions, CI workflows, check runs, workflow secrets, token permissions, runners, or automation evidence ŌåÆ route to `tool.github_actions` first; use `tool.codex_exec`, `vcb.workflow.ci_noninteractive`, and `vcb.workflow.ci_triage` as companion routes.
- User asks about Dependabot, dependency alerts, vulnerable dependency PRs, version-update PRs, or dependency-maintenance queues ŌåÆ route to `tool.github_dependabot` first; use `vcb.workflow.dependency_update_review` as the review workflow.
- User asks about npm, package.json, package scripts, dependency manifests, lockfiles, install behavior, or npm audit output ŌåÆ route to `tool.npm` first; use `vcb.workflow.dependency_decisions` and `vcb.workflow.dependency_update_review` as companion routes.
- User asks about Playwright, browser tests, end-to-end tests, screenshots, traces, or UI verification in CI ŌåÆ route to `tool.playwright` first; use `vcb.workflow.frontend_work`, `vcb.workflow.visual_qa`, and `tool.github_actions` as companion routes.
- User asks about OpenSSF Scorecard, repository health, dependency health, supply-chain quality, or automated project-risk signals ŌåÆ route to `tool.openssf_scorecard` first; use `tool.github_actions`, `tool.github_dependabot`, and `tool.codex_security` as companion routes.

## Primary Codex Tool Card Fast Routing

- User asks what Codex tool or surface to use ŌåÆ route first to `tool.codex`, then to the smallest active surface card.
- User asks about desktop/local Codex threads, worktrees, review panes, Git actions, or app orchestration ŌåÆ route to `tool.codex_app`.
- User asks about terminal Codex, sandbox/approval posture, shell-backed local work, or CLI behavior ŌåÆ route to `tool.codex_cli`.
- User asks about editor context, selected code, open files, @file references, or IDE cloud handoff ŌåÆ route to `tool.codex_ide_extension`.
- User asks about background cloud tasks, cloud environments, cloud PRs, parallel cloud delegation, or review-later work ŌåÆ route to `tool.codex_cloud`.
- User asks about `@codex review`, automatic PR reviews, GitHub code review, or review comments ŌåÆ route to `tool.codex_github_review`.
- User asks about `codex exec`, non-interactive mode, scripts, CI-style runs, JSONL/schema output, or automation credentials ŌåÆ route to `tool.codex_exec`.

## Adjunct Codex Tool Card Fast Routing

- User asks about worktrees, local/app branch isolation, background worktree handoff, or parallel local tasks ŌåÆ route to `tool.codex_worktrees`.
- User asks about subagents, custom agents, parallel specialist analysis, or agent swarms ŌåÆ route to `tool.codex_subagents`.
- User asks about automations, recurring Codex tasks, scheduled checks, Triage output, or report-first recurring work ŌåÆ route to `tool.codex_automations`.
- User asks about Computer Use, desktop app control, GUI operation, OS app permissions, or visible app state ŌåÆ route to `tool.codex_computer_use`.
- User asks about in-app browser preview, browser comments, screenshots, local web verification, or rendered-page evidence ŌåÆ route to `tool.codex_browser`.
- User asks about Chrome extension, signed-in browser state, website approvals, allow/block lists, or browser-history/account risk ŌåÆ route to `tool.codex_chrome_extension`.


## Customization and Control Codex Tool Card Fast Routing

- User asks about AGENTS.md, durable repo guidance, project instructions, or repeated repo rules ŌåÆ route to `tool.codex_agents_md`; use `vcb.codex.agents_md` only for companion mechanics.
- User asks about Codex config, profiles, defaults, sandbox/approval defaults, or project-local settings ŌåÆ route to `tool.codex_config`; use `vcb.codex.config` only for companion mechanics.
- User asks about Codex skills, reusable workflows, skill triggers, or packaged domain procedures ŌåÆ route to `tool.codex_skills`; use `vcb.codex.skills` only for companion mechanics.
- User asks about MCP, external tools, context servers, tool auth, or server sprawl ŌåÆ route to `tool.codex_mcp`; use `vcb.codex.mcp` only for companion mechanics.
- User asks about hooks, deterministic lifecycle guardrails, prompt/command checks, logging, or validation scripts ŌåÆ route to `tool.codex_hooks`; use `vcb.codex.hooks` only for companion mechanics.

## Codex Security Tool Card Fast Routing

- User asks about Codex Security, Codex Security plugin, Codex Security cloud, security review scans, security diff scans, vulnerability finding review, finding validation, threat-model tuning for Codex Security, or security fix preparation ŌåÆ retrieve `tool.codex_security` first; use `vcb.safety.security_review`, `tool.codex_cloud`, `tool.codex_github_review`, and related safety/workflow cards as companion routes.
- User asks for a security guarantee, compliance certification, or whether a scan proves an app is secure ŌåÆ retrieve `tool.codex_security` first, then `vcb.safety.security_review`; emphasize evidence, validation limits, and human security ownership.

## Codex Governance and Maintenance Tool Card Fast Routing

- User asks whether a Codex feature is safe/current/stable enough to use, whether a feature is production-ready, or how to interpret maturity/support posture ŌåÆ retrieve `tool.codex_feature_maturity` first; use `vcb.codex.feature_maturity` only for companion mechanics.
- User asks what changed in Codex, whether VCB guidance is stale, how to monitor official releases, how to update source dates/routes, or how to handle deprecations after a Codex update ŌåÆ retrieve `tool.codex_changelog_monitoring` first; use `vcb.codex.changelog_monitoring`, `SOURCE_REGISTER.md`, and `DEPRECATION_REGISTER.md` as companion maintenance routes.

## Repository-Contract Cleanup Fast Routing

- User asks about glossary terms for optimism bias, completion bias, plausibility bias, AI agreement, confident summaries, or answer-shopping ŌåÆ route through `indexes/GLOSSARY.md` to active atomic cards such as `vcb.shortcut.ignoring_model_biases`, `vcb.shortcut.trusting_estimates_before_inspection`, `vcb.shortcut.consensus_as_correctness`, `vcb.shortcut.best_of_n_without_review`, and `vcb.shortcut.cherry_picking_ai_answers`.
- User asks about a planned shortcut alias that redirects to an active card ŌåÆ prefer the manifest canonical replacement, then check `DEPRECATION_REGISTER.md` and `SHORTCUT_REGISTER.md` for the alias policy. Do not route a redirected alias as the smallest active card.
- Key hardened active routes include `vcb.shortcut.default_config_forever` for alias `vcb.shortcut.using_global_config_for_everything`, `vcb.shortcut.many_ais_same_files` for alias `vcb.shortcut.parallel_agents_same_files`, `vcb.shortcut.parallel_agents_edit_same_files` for alias `vcb.shortcut.parallel_tasks_same_files`, and `vcb.shortcut.browser_clicking_without_repro` for alias `vcb.shortcut.screenshot_only_verification`.

## Active Chapters

- `vcb.chapter.how_to_use_this_bible` ŌĆö Chapter 0 ŌĆö How to Use This Bible ŌĆö `chapters/00-how-to-use-this-bible.md`
- `vcb.chapter.codex_mental_model` ŌĆö Chapter 1 ŌĆö What Codex Actually Is ŌĆö `chapters/01-codex-mental-model.md`
- `vcb.chapter.vibe_coder_advantage_and_risk` ŌĆö Chapter 2 ŌĆö The Vibe CoderŌĆÖs Advantage and Weakness ŌĆö `chapters/02-vibe-coder-advantage-and-risk.md`
- `vcb.chapter.codex_surfaces` ŌĆö Chapter 3 ŌĆö The Codex Surfaces: App, IDE, CLI, Cloud, GitHub, SDK ŌĆö `chapters/03-codex-surfaces.md`
- `vcb.chapter.installing_and_configuring_codex` ŌĆö Chapter 4 ŌĆö Installing and Configuring Codex Without Creating a Mess ŌĆö `chapters/04-installing-and-configuring-codex.md`
- `vcb.chapter.sandboxing_and_approvals` ŌĆö Chapter 5 ŌĆö Sandboxes, Approvals, and Why Full Access Is Usually a Bad Default ŌĆö `chapters/05-sandboxing-and-approvals.md`

## Active Failure-Mode Cards

- `vcb.failure.hallucinated_apis` ŌĆö hallucinated APIs and fake interface contracts ŌĆö `topics/failure-modes/hallucinated-apis.md`
- `vcb.failure.context_pollution` ŌĆö stale, noisy, excessive, or contradictory context ŌĆö `topics/failure-modes/context-pollution.md`
- `vcb.failure.weakened_tests` ŌĆö tests changed to pass without proving behavior ŌĆö `topics/failure-modes/weakened-tests.md`
- `vcb.failure.broad_refactor_drift` ŌĆö refactor work drifting into behavior change or rewrite ŌĆö `topics/failure-modes/broad-refactor-drift.md`
- `vcb.failure.dependency_bloat` ŌĆö unnecessary dependencies and supply-chain drag ŌĆö `topics/failure-modes/dependency-bloat.md`
- `vcb.failure.ui_taste_gap` ŌĆö frontend work that renders but lacks state, responsive, accessibility, or polish evidence ŌĆö `topics/failure-modes/ui-taste-gap.md`
- `vcb.failure.ci_false_confidence` ŌĆö green CI mistaken for complete verification ŌĆö `topics/failure-modes/ci-false-confidence.md`
- `vcb.failure.done_claim_without_evidence` ŌĆö done claim without artifact evidence ŌĆö `topics/failure-modes/done-claim-without-evidence.md`

## Active Shortcut Harm-Reduction Cards

- `vcb.shortcut.skipping_tests` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/skipping-tests.md` ŌĆö risk-managed shortcut card for accepting changes without the smallest relevant verification.
- `vcb.shortcut.skipping_plan` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/skipping-plan.md` ŌĆö plan-before-mutation guardrails.
- `vcb.shortcut.one_big_prompt` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/one-big-prompt.md` ŌĆö oversized prompt and slicing guardrails.
- `vcb.shortcut.vague_prompt` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/vague-prompt.md` ŌĆö goal/context/constraints/done-when guardrails.
- `vcb.shortcut.accepting_diff_without_review` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/accepting-diff-without-review.md` ŌĆö changed-file review guardrails.
- `vcb.shortcut.ignoring_lint_typecheck` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/ignoring-lint-typecheck.md` ŌĆö static-check failure triage.
- `vcb.shortcut.coding_on_main` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/coding-on-main.md` ŌĆö branch/worktree isolation guardrails.
- `vcb.shortcut.manual_testing_only` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/manual-testing-only.md` ŌĆö repeatable verification guardrails.
- `vcb.shortcut.debugging_without_repro` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/debugging-without-repro.md` ŌĆö reproduction-before-patch guardrails.
- `vcb.shortcut.accepting_looks_done` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/accepting-looks-done.md` ŌĆö risk-managed shortcut card for accepting polished output without completion evidence.
- `vcb.shortcut.broad_agent_permissions` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/broad-agent-permissions.md` ŌĆö risk-managed shortcut card for broad filesystem/network/tool/account access.
- `vcb.shortcut.unattended_long_runs` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/unattended-long-runs.md` ŌĆö risk-managed shortcut card for long-running work without checkpoints.
- `vcb.shortcut.broad_refactor` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/broad-refactor.md` ŌĆö risk-managed shortcut card for broad cleanup or refactor prompts.
- `vcb.shortcut.context_dumping` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/context-dumping.md` ŌĆö risk-managed shortcut card for noisy/stale prompt context.
- `vcb.shortcut.adding_dependencies_fast` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/adding-dependencies-fast.md` ŌĆö risk-managed shortcut card for fast dependency additions.
- `vcb.shortcut.reviewing_cloud_summary_only` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/reviewing-cloud-summary-only.md` ŌĆö risk-managed shortcut card for cloud/background work reviewed only by summary.

## Active Security and Permission Shortcut Cards

- `vcb.shortcut.production_console_computer_use` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/production-console-computer-use.md` ŌĆö production/admin console GUI actions with Computer Use or browser control.
- `vcb.shortcut.overbroad_ci_permissions` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/overbroad-ci-permissions.md` ŌĆö CI jobs with broader repository/deploy/cloud permissions than the task needs.
- `vcb.shortcut.long_lived_ci_secrets` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/long-lived-ci-secrets.md` ŌĆö persistent CI credentials instead of short-lived or scoped alternatives.
- `vcb.shortcut.real_secrets_in_prototype` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/real-secrets-in-prototype.md` ŌĆö real credentials or production data inside disposable prototypes.
- `vcb.shortcut.cloud_work_with_real_secrets` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/cloud-work-with-real-secrets.md` ŌĆö delegated cloud tasks with production or real service secrets.
- `vcb.shortcut.full_access_automation` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/full-access-automation.md` ŌĆö automated agents with full filesystem, network, command, or credential access.
- `vcb.shortcut.unattended_mutation` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/unattended-mutation.md` ŌĆö write-capable agent work without human checkpointing.
- `vcb.shortcut.always_allow_sensitive_apps` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/always-allow-sensitive-apps.md` ŌĆö persistent app/site approvals for sensitive GUI or browser surfaces.

## Tool-Sprawl, Skill, and Reusable-Process Shortcut Fast Routing

- User asks about premature skills, skill sprawl, tool sprawl, MCP sprawl, brittle hooks, tiny-project process overhead, fake team workflow, or copied playbooks ŌåÆ retrieve the matching active Chunk 23 `vcb.shortcut.*` card.
- `vcb.shortcut.skill_overkill` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/skill-overkill.md` ŌĆö avoid premature skills for one-off prompts.
- `vcb.shortcut.skill_sprawl` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/skill-sprawl.md` ŌĆö audit overlapping or stale skills.
- `vcb.shortcut.tool_sprawl` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/tool-sprawl.md` ŌĆö control minimum viable tool stack decisions.
- `vcb.shortcut.tool_sprawl_mcp` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/tool-sprawl-mcp.md` ŌĆö scope MCP servers, tools, credentials, and approvals.
- `vcb.shortcut.brittle_hooks` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/brittle-hooks.md` ŌĆö keep hooks deterministic, fast, and reviewable.
- `vcb.shortcut.process_overhead_for_tiny_project` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/process-overhead-for-tiny-project.md` ŌĆö right-size process for tiny projects.
- `vcb.shortcut.team_workflow_without_team` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/team-workflow-without-team.md` ŌĆö avoid fake team ceremony in solo work.
- `vcb.shortcut.copy_pasting_playbook_blindly` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/copy-pasting-playbook-blindly.md` ŌĆö tailor playbooks before execution.

- `vcb.codex.subagents` ŌĆö Codex Subagents ŌĆö `topics/codex/subagents.md`
- `vcb.codex.computer_use` ŌĆö Codex Computer Use ŌĆö `topics/codex/computer-use.md`

## Fast Routing

- Need hosting/backend/auth/payment/observability/product-analytics tool guidance ŌåÆ retrieve the smallest active platform/tool card first: `tool.vercel`, `tool.cloudflare`, or `tool.netlify` for hosting/deployment/DNS/edge/site contexts; `tool.supabase` or `tool.neon` for backend/database/Postgres contexts; `tool.clerk` or `tool.auth0` for auth/IAM contexts; `tool.stripe` for payments; `tool.resend` for email/notifications; `tool.sentry` for error/performance evidence; and `tool.posthog` for analytics/replay/feature flags. Use chapters/workflows only as companion guidance.
- Need a plain software concept ŌåÆ retrieve the matching `vcb.concepts.*` card.
- Need current Codex product behavior ŌåÆ retrieve the matching `vcb.codex.*` card and check official OpenAI source rows.
- Need prompt/workflow discipline ŌåÆ retrieve the matching `vcb.prompting.*` or `vcb.workflow.*` card, including Chunk 17 frontend/refactor/dependency/docs workflow cards.
- Need Codex Security tooling or review/safety/verification workflow discipline ŌåÆ retrieve `tool.codex_security` first for Codex Security scans/findings/fix preparation, then `vcb.workflow.codex_output_review`, `vcb.workflow.reviewing_diffs`, `vcb.workflow.github_pr_review`, `vcb.safety.security_review`, `vcb.safety.secrets`, `vcb.workflow.ci_triage`, `vcb.workflow.ci_noninteractive`, or `vcb.safety.production_red_lines`.
- Need failure-mode diagnosis ŌåÆ retrieve `vcb.failure.hallucinated_apis`, `vcb.failure.context_pollution`, `vcb.failure.weakened_tests`, `vcb.failure.broad_refactor_drift`, `vcb.failure.dependency_bloat`, `vcb.failure.ui_taste_gap`, `vcb.failure.ci_false_confidence`, or `vcb.failure.done_claim_without_evidence`.
- Need frontend/refactor/dependency/docs workflow discipline ŌåÆ retrieve `vcb.workflow.frontend_work`, `vcb.workflow.visual_qa`, `vcb.workflow.accessibility_review`, `vcb.workflow.refactoring`, `vcb.workflow.dependency_decisions`, `vcb.workflow.dependency_update_review`, `vcb.workflow.release_notes`, or `vcb.workflow.documentation_updates`.
- Need constraint/budget guidance ŌåÆ retrieve `vcb.constraints.operating_mode`, `vcb.constraints.attention_budget`, `vcb.constraints.usage_burn`, `vcb.constraints.recovery_budget`, `vcb.constraints.build_vs_maintenance`, `vcb.constraints.production_quality`, `vcb.constraints.scope_budget`, or `vcb.constraints.review_budget` before falling back to Chapters 39ŌĆō43 or active pricing snapshots.
- Need shortcut harm-reduction guidance for skipping tests, accepting looks-done claims, broad permissions, unattended long runs, broad refactors, context dumping, fast dependencies, or cloud-summary-only review ŌåÆ retrieve the matching `vcb.shortcut.*` card from Chunk 20.
- Need Issue #3 shortcut-audit guidance for vague prompts, skipped planning, one big prompt, accepting diffs without review, ignoring lint/typecheck, coding on main, manual-only testing, or debugging without reproduction ŌåÆ retrieve the matching active `vcb.shortcut.*` card.
- Need security/permission shortcut guidance for production GUI actions, broad CI permissions, long-lived CI secrets, real secrets in prototypes/cloud work, full-access automation, unattended mutation, or always-allowed sensitive apps ŌåÆ retrieve the matching `vcb.shortcut.*` card from Chunk 21.
- User asks about premature skills, too many skills, too many tools, whether MCP is needed, brittle hooks, adding tools instead of shipping, process overhead for tiny projects, team workflow without a team, or copied playbooks ŌåÆ retrieve the matching active Chunk 23 `vcb.shortcut.*` card before falling back to Chapter 38 or `SHORTCUT_REGISTER.md`.
- User asks about many AIs, multiple models, parallel agents, best-of-N answers, AI consensus, cherry-picking AI answers, trusting estimates before inspection, model biases, model routing guesswork, or subagent swarms ŌåÆ retrieve the matching active Chunk 24 `vcb.shortcut.*` card before falling back to Chapter 44, Chapter 46, or `SHORTCUT_REGISTER.md`.
- Need risk or shortcut guidance beyond authored shortcut cards ŌåÆ retrieve Chapter 38 plus relevant shortcut register entries.
- Need current/deprecation review, feature maturity review, changelog monitoring, deprecation watch, or Codex guidance freshness checks ŌåÆ retrieve `tool.codex_changelog_monitoring` and `tool.codex_feature_maturity` first, then `vcb.codex.changelog_monitoring`, `vcb.codex.feature_maturity`, `SOURCE_REGISTER.md`, and `DEPRECATION_REGISTER.md`.
- Need first-party Codex tool-card guidance ŌåÆ retrieve `tool.codex` first, then the smallest active primary, adjunct, customization/control, security, or governance/maintenance card: `tool.codex_app`, `tool.codex_cli`, `tool.codex_ide_extension`, `tool.codex_cloud`, `tool.codex_github_review`, `tool.codex_exec`, `tool.codex_worktrees`, `tool.codex_subagents`, `tool.codex_automations`, `tool.codex_computer_use`, `tool.codex_browser`, `tool.codex_chrome_extension`, `tool.codex_agents_md`, `tool.codex_config`, `tool.codex_skills`, `tool.codex_mcp`, `tool.codex_hooks`, `tool.codex_security`, `tool.codex_feature_maturity`, or `tool.codex_changelog_monitoring`.
- Need prompt/workflow coaching ŌåÆ retrieve the matching `vcb.prompting.*` or `vcb.workflow.*` card before falling back to chapter wrappers.

## Parallel Cloud and Automation Shortcut Fast Routing

- User asks about unattended cloud/background delegation, cloud tasks running while away, or async task handoff ŌåÆ route first to `vcb.shortcut.unattended_cloud_delegation`, then `vcb.shortcut.reviewing_cloud_summary_only`, then `vcb.codex.cloud`.
- User asks about vague cloud tasks, missing context, or cloud work guessing project state ŌåÆ route to `vcb.shortcut.ambiguous_cloud_task` and `vcb.shortcut.cloud_task_without_context`.
- User asks about many cloud tasks, parallel background branches, or integration conflict ŌåÆ route to `vcb.shortcut.parallel_cloud_sprawl`, `vcb.shortcut.conflicting_parallel_agents`, and `vcb.shortcut.parallel_agents_edit_same_files`.
- User asks about recurring automation noise, scheduled AI spam, or automation output no one reads ŌåÆ route to `vcb.shortcut.automation_spam`.
- User asks about noninteractive or scheduled AI changing files/settings without review ŌåÆ route to `vcb.shortcut.automation_mutation_without_review`, then `vcb.shortcut.unattended_mutation`.
- User asks about browser/GUI work, clicking around, signed-in browser pages, or secrets visible in Chrome/admin consoles ŌåÆ route to `vcb.shortcut.browser_clicking_without_repro` and `vcb.shortcut.logged_in_browser_secrets`.

## Active Chunk 25 Parallel Cloud and Automation Shortcut Cards

- `vcb.shortcut.unattended_cloud_delegation` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/unattended-cloud-delegation.md` ŌĆö unattended cloud/background delegation guardrails.
- `vcb.shortcut.ambiguous_cloud_task` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/ambiguous-cloud-task.md` ŌĆö plan-first guardrails for vague cloud work.
- `vcb.shortcut.cloud_task_without_context` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/cloud-task-without-context.md` ŌĆö cloud task context/delegation packet guardrails.
- `vcb.shortcut.parallel_cloud_sprawl` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/parallel-cloud-sprawl.md` ŌĆö parallel cloud task sprawl guardrails.
- `vcb.shortcut.conflicting_parallel_agents` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/conflicting-parallel-agents.md` ŌĆö conflicting write agents and integration guardrails.
- `vcb.shortcut.automation_spam` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/automation-spam.md` ŌĆö recurring automation noise guardrails.
- `vcb.shortcut.automation_mutation_without_review` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/automation-mutation-without-review.md` ŌĆö scheduled/noninteractive mutation review gates.
- `vcb.shortcut.browser_clicking_without_repro` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/browser-clicking-without-repro.md` ŌĆö GUI/browser repro guardrails.
- `vcb.shortcut.logged_in_browser_secrets` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/logged-in-browser-secrets.md` ŌĆö signed-in browser secrets/account-authority guardrails.

## Shortcut Harm-Reduction Card Fast Routing

- `vcb.shortcut.skipping_tests` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/skipping-tests.md` ŌĆö skipped verification and hidden regressions.
- `vcb.shortcut.skipping_plan` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/skipping-plan.md` ŌĆö plan-before-mutation guardrails.
- `vcb.shortcut.one_big_prompt` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/one-big-prompt.md` ŌĆö oversized prompt and slicing guardrails.
- `vcb.shortcut.vague_prompt` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/vague-prompt.md` ŌĆö goal/context/constraints/done-when guardrails.
- `vcb.shortcut.accepting_diff_without_review` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/accepting-diff-without-review.md` ŌĆö changed-file review guardrails.
- `vcb.shortcut.ignoring_lint_typecheck` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/ignoring-lint-typecheck.md` ŌĆö static-check failure triage.
- `vcb.shortcut.coding_on_main` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/coding-on-main.md` ŌĆö branch/worktree isolation guardrails.
- `vcb.shortcut.manual_testing_only` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/manual-testing-only.md` ŌĆö repeatable verification guardrails.
- `vcb.shortcut.debugging_without_repro` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/debugging-without-repro.md` ŌĆö reproduction-before-patch guardrails.
- `vcb.shortcut.accepting_looks_done` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/accepting-looks-done.md` ŌĆö polished done claims without evidence.
- `vcb.shortcut.broad_agent_permissions` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/broad-agent-permissions.md` ŌĆö broad filesystem, command, network, or tool permissions.
- `vcb.shortcut.unattended_long_runs` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/unattended-long-runs.md` ŌĆö long autonomous work without milestone checkpoints.
- `vcb.shortcut.broad_refactor` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/broad-refactor.md` ŌĆö cleanup drifting into behavior change.
- `vcb.shortcut.context_dumping` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/context-dumping.md` ŌĆö stale, excessive, or contradictory context.
- `vcb.shortcut.adding_dependencies_fast` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/adding-dependencies-fast.md` ŌĆö package bloat and supply-chain drag.
- `vcb.shortcut.reviewing_cloud_summary_only` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/reviewing-cloud-summary-only.md` ŌĆö summary accepted without diff/check evidence.

- User asks to make a shortcut safer ŌåÆ retrieve the matching active `vcb.shortcut.*` card from the active shortcut-card slices, including Chunk 20 harm-reduction cards, Chunk 21 security/permission cards, Chunk 22 setup/process cards, Chunk 23 tool-sprawl/skill/reusable-workflow cards, Chunk 24 multi-AI/model-bias cards, Chunk 25 parallel/cloud/automation cards, Chunk 26 alias/deprecation routing cleanup, and Issue #3 post-release shortcut-audit cards, before falling back to Chapter 38 or `SHORTCUT_REGISTER.md`.
- User asks about skipping tests, accepting looks done, broad permissions, unattended long runs, broad refactors, context dumping, fast dependencies, or cloud summaries ŌåÆ retrieve the matching active shortcut card.
- User asks about vague prompts, skipped planning, one big prompt, accepting diffs without review, ignoring lint/typecheck, coding on main, manual-only testing, or debugging without reproduction ŌåÆ retrieve the matching active Issue #3 shortcut-audit card.
- User asks about production GUI actions, broad CI permissions, long-lived CI secrets, real secrets, cloud secrets, full-access automation, unattended mutation, or always-allow app/site permissions ŌåÆ retrieve the matching active security/permission shortcut card.

## Active Pricing and Constraint Files

- `vcb.pricing_snapshot.openai_codex` ŌĆö `pricing-snapshots/2026-06-09-openai-codex.md`
- `vcb.pricing_snapshot.ai_coding_tools` ŌĆö `pricing-snapshots/2026-06-12-ai-coding-tools.md`

## Setup, Configuration, and Process Shortcut Fast Routing

- `vcb.shortcut.skipping_setup` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/skipping-setup.md` ŌĆö inspect setup before edits and run one smallest verification.
- `vcb.shortcut.default_config_forever` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/default-config-forever.md` ŌĆö review Codex config defaults and risky profiles by project phase.
- `vcb.shortcut.skipping_agents_md` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/skipping-agents-md.md` ŌĆö promote repeated project guidance into durable repo instructions.
- `vcb.shortcut.overstuffing_agents_md` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/overstuffing-agents-md.md` ŌĆö prune AGENTS.md so durable guidance does not become context pollution.
- `vcb.shortcut.stale_agents_md` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/stale-agents-md.md` ŌĆö verify old repo guidance before future agents follow it.
- `vcb.shortcut.unofficial_tools` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/unofficial-tools.md` ŌĆö vet plugins, MCP servers, wrappers, extensions, and scripts before enabling.
- `vcb.shortcut.hook_overreach` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/hook-overreach.md` ŌĆö keep hooks objective and narrow instead of treating them as complete policy.
- `vcb.shortcut.trusting_external_tool_output` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/trusting-external-tool-output.md` ŌĆö verify MCP/plugin/web/tool output with source evidence before mutation.

## Active Constraint and Budget Cards

- `vcb.constraints.operating_mode` ŌĆö `Operating Mode` ŌĆö `topics/constraints/operating-mode.md`
- `vcb.constraints.attention_budget` ŌĆö `Attention Budget` ŌĆö `topics/constraints/attention-budget.md`
- `vcb.constraints.usage_burn` ŌĆö `Usage Burn` ŌĆö `topics/constraints/usage-burn.md`
- `vcb.constraints.recovery_budget` ŌĆö `Recovery Budget` ŌĆö `topics/constraints/recovery-budget.md`
- `vcb.constraints.build_vs_maintenance` ŌĆö `Build Vs Maintenance` ŌĆö `topics/constraints/build-vs-maintenance.md`
- `vcb.constraints.production_quality` ŌĆö `Production Quality Constraints` ŌĆö `topics/constraints/production-quality-constraints.md`
- `vcb.constraints.scope_budget` ŌĆö `Scope Budget` ŌĆö `topics/constraints/scope-budget.md`
- `vcb.constraints.review_budget` ŌĆö `Review Budget` ŌĆö `topics/constraints/review-budget.md`

## Constraint/Budget Fast Routing

- Need to choose a Codex surface, autonomy level, or delegation mode ŌåÆ retrieve `tool.codex` first for surface choice and `vcb.constraints.operating_mode` as the operating-mode companion card.
- Need to adapt work to available human focus ŌåÆ retrieve `vcb.constraints.attention_budget`.
- Need to manage usage limits, credits, token burn, context, retries, or exact pricing-snapshot routing ŌåÆ retrieve `vcb.constraints.usage_burn`.
- Need to decide whether a fast change is recoverable enough ŌåÆ retrieve `vcb.constraints.recovery_budget`.
- Need to adapt behavior for prototype, MVP, production build, maintenance, refactor, or hotfix phase ŌåÆ retrieve `vcb.constraints.build_vs_maintenance`; when prototype also means app-builder/browser-dev tool choice, retrieve `tool.replit`, `tool.lovable`, `tool.bolt`, or `tool.v0` as the smallest active tool card.
- Need to judge production readiness ŌåÆ retrieve `vcb.constraints.production_quality`; when deployment, data, auth, payment, observability, analytics, or feature-flag evidence is involved, retrieve the relevant active platform tool card: `tool.vercel`, `tool.cloudflare`, `tool.netlify`, `tool.supabase`, `tool.neon`, `tool.clerk`, `tool.auth0`, `tool.stripe`, `tool.resend`, `tool.sentry`, or `tool.posthog`.
- Need to shrink a broad task into a reviewable slice ŌåÆ retrieve `vcb.constraints.scope_budget`.
- Need to size a task to available diff/PR review capacity ŌåÆ retrieve `vcb.constraints.review_budget`.

## Multi-AI and Model-Bias Shortcut Fast Routing

- `vcb.shortcut.many_ais_same_files` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/many-ais-same-files.md` ŌĆö using multiple AI systems on the same files without one owner, one branch strategy, and one integration path.
- `vcb.shortcut.parallel_agents_edit_same_files` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/parallel-agents-edit-same-files.md` ŌĆö letting multiple agents mutate overlapping files at the same time and hoping the merge will be obvious later.
- `vcb.shortcut.best_of_n_without_review` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/best-of-n-without-review.md` ŌĆö asking several AIs for answers, then accepting the one that looks best without checking diffs, tests, source evidence, or risks.
- `vcb.shortcut.cherry_picking_ai_answers` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/cherry-picking-ai-answers.md` ŌĆö choosing the answer that confirms your preferred plan instead of the answer with the best evidence.
- `vcb.shortcut.consensus_as_correctness` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/consensus-as-correctness.md` ŌĆö treating agreement between multiple AIs as proof that a claim, estimate, fix, or design is correct.
- `vcb.shortcut.trusting_estimates_before_inspection` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/trusting-estimates-before-inspection.md` ŌĆö believing an AI estimate before the model has inspected the actual code, dependencies, tests, constraints, and unknowns.
- `vcb.shortcut.ignoring_model_biases` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/ignoring-model-biases.md` ŌĆö forgetting that models can be biased toward plausible answers, overconfident summaries, common patterns, pleasing the user, and underestimating hidden project constraints.
- `vcb.shortcut.model_routing_guesswork` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/model-routing-guesswork.md` ŌĆö choosing a model, reasoning level, surface, or AI tool by brand feeling, stale advice, or price anxiety instead of current docs, task shape, risk, and evidence needs.
- `vcb.shortcut.subagent_swarm` ŌĆö `topics/shortcuts/subagent-swarm.md` ŌĆö spawning many subagents or custom agents before each has a bounded question, role, context, output format, and integration plan.
